title: The Trail Rider
writer: Thomas Dixon Jr., George Washington Ogden
actors: Buck Jones, Nancy Deaver, Lucy Fox
plot: Tex Hartwell comes to the aid of an old cobbler by protecting him from the blows and insults of Jim Mackey, a skinflint banker. Mackey orders his hired guns to get Tex, but Tex is too quick for them. On the strength of his fast dr...
